Financial stability of farmers if farmers' fruit crops are insured against weather hazards
Priority in the state is based on reconstructed climate to help with sustainability.
Fruit insurance scheme is being implemented. Due to various climatic hazards, the productivity of fruits is being affected.
Adverse effects result in a large-scale reduction in yield. Alternately, farmers do not get the expected yield.
The farmers face a financial crisis on account of all these factors.
Restructured weather-based fertility insurance plans as a way to get compensation
In the state, three years in the year 2021-22, 2022-23, and 2023-24, the deer population includes oranges, mongooses, etc.
Revenue Boards in 26 districts for 8 fruits: Pomegranate, Chikoo, Guava. Lemon, Citrus and Grape (C).
Components include HDFC AGO General Insurance Co. Ltd., IndusInd General Insurance Co. Ltd., and
Under the Government Decision in Reference No. 1 implemented by three insurance companies, namely, Indian Agricultural Insurance Co., Ltd.
